overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval Gothic great hall interior from a video game, featuring soaring wooden beams, stone walls, ornate chandeliers, and students seated at long wooden tables. The scene is lit by warm artificial chandelier light mixed with cool natural light from tall arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with long dining tables and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the great hall interior and students at their tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at wooden table reading a book
student sitting on bench facing away from camera toward the hall

entered.detail: large iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling beam
tall gothic window with multiple panes letting in natural light
long dark wooden table with benches and scattered books
large arched wooden door at the far end of the hall with stone surround
dark stone walls with vertical wooden paneling and columns
exposed dark wooden trusses and beams supporting the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a grand Gothic great hall with high wooden ceilings and stone walls. Warm light from ornate chandeliers illuminates the space while cool daylight streams through tall arched windows on the left. A few students in dark robes sit at the long wooden tables, reading or studying in the quiet atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand Gothic great hall where warm interior light blends with cool natural daylight. It begins with a wide view of the soaring wooden ceilings and heavy stone walls that define the cavernous space. As the eye settles, the focus shifts toward the interplay of light, where the golden glow of ornate chandeliers meets the pale blue light streaming through tall arched windows. The scene then lingers on the quiet atmosphere of the hall, centering on students in dark robes who sit at long wooden tables reading and studying.
